themes.reasoning_notes: Aura that enchants your creature; its main deckbuilding relevance is being a cheap Aura rather than broad removal.
Activated ability repeatedly pings target creature with flying, offering narrow creature interaction against fliers.
Cheap Aura that only enchants your own creature; its clearest deckbuilding relevance is as an Aura payoff/enabler piece.
Its activated ability only targets creatures with flying, making this narrow anti-flyer interaction rather than general spot removal.
